title: Timer Mode Management
summary: Enable users to switch between focus and break modes with automatic timer adjustment and reset.
businessValue: As a user, I want to easily toggle between focus and break modes so that I can follow the Pomodoro workflow without manual timer adjustment.
includedCapabilities: Automatic timer duration change on mode switch

stories.title: Display and style Focus/Break mode selector
stories.businessValue: As a user, I want to see which timer mode is active so that I can easily identify whether I'm in a focus or break session.

acceptanceCriteria.then: I see two mode buttons labeled "Focus" and "Break"

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Focus mode is selected by default with active styling
acceptanceCriteria.then: the Focus button is selected by default with active styling (background #0891B2, text #F8FAFC, border-radius 10px)
it displays inactive styling (transparent background, text #CBD5E1)

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Mode styling updates when switching modes
acceptanceCriteria.then: it displays inactive styling and the Break button displays active styling

definitionOfDone: Mode selector renders with both Focus and Break buttons
Active mode styling matches design specification exactly
Inactive mode styling matches design specification exactly
Focus mode is selected and styled active on page load
Component responds correctly to mode state changes
Unit tests verify render and styling behavior
Component has no console errors or warnings

stories.title: Implement mode switching logic with automatic timer reset
stories.businessValue: As a user, I want the timer to automatically reset when I switch between focus and break modes so that I don't have to manually adjust the timer.

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Switch from Focus to Break resets timer
acceptanceCriteria.given: I am in Focus mode with timer at 10:00
acceptanceCriteria.then: the mode changes to Break and the timer resets to 05:00

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Switch from Break to Focus resets timer
acceptanceCriteria.given: I am in Break mode with timer at 02:00
acceptanceCriteria.then: the mode changes to Focus and the timer resets to 25:00

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Running timer stops when mode switches
acceptanceCriteria.when: I click a different mode button
acceptanceCriteria.then: the timer stops and resets to the new mode's default duration

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: Switching to same mode does not cause issues
acceptanceCriteria.when: I click the Focus button again
acceptanceCriteria.then: nothing changes and no errors occur

definitionOfDone: Clicking a mode button updates the mode state
Timer duration resets to correct value for new mode (25:00 for Focus, 05:00 for Break)
Running timer stops when mode is changed
Timer display updates immediately after mode switch
Mode state persists in component state
Tests verify mode switching behavior
Tests verify timer reset on mode switch
Tests verify running timer stops on mode switch
Tests verify same-mode button click is idempotent

stories.title: Add timer mode to session model and CreateTimerSession endpoint
stories.businessValue: As a developer, I want the backend to store timer mode in the session model so that the frontend can reliably create and manage sessions with the correct mode.

acceptanceCriteria.then: it includes a Mode property that can store "focus" or "break"

acceptanceCriteria.given: I call the CreateTimerSession endpoint with mode="focus"
acceptanceCriteria.then: the created session has mode set to "focus"
the response includes the created session with mode="break"

acceptanceCriteria.given: I create a session with mode="focus" and retrieve it with GetTimerSession
acceptanceCriteria.then: the mode property is correctly persisted and returned as "focus"

definitionOfDone: TimerSession model includes Mode property (enum or string: "focus"/"break")
CreateTimerSession endpoint accepts mode parameter
Mode parameter is validated (only accepts "focus" or "break")
Mode is stored in database when session is created
CreateTimerSession response includes mode in session data
GetTimerSession endpoint returns mode for existing sessions
Unit tests verify mode storage
Unit tests verify mode retrieval
Integration tests verify database persistence
API documentation includes mode field in request/response

stories.title: Implement mode updates in UpdateTimerSession endpoint
stories.businessValue: As a developer, I want the frontend to be able to update a session's mode through the API so that mode changes are persisted to the backend.

acceptanceCriteria.scenario: UpdateTimerSession changes mode from focus to break
acceptanceCriteria.given: I have a timer session with mode="focus"
acceptanceCriteria.then: the session mode is updated to "break"

acceptanceCriteria.given: I update a session to mode="break"
acceptanceCriteria.when: I retrieve the session with GetTimerSession

acceptanceCriteria.given: I call UpdateTimerSession with a new mode
acceptanceCriteria.then: it includes the updated session with the new mode value

definitionOfDone: UpdateTimerSession endpoint accepts mode parameter
Mode parameter is validated (only accepts "focus" or "break")
Mode is updated in database for the specified session
UpdateTimerSession response includes updated mode
Updated mode persists across subsequent GetTimerSession calls
Unit tests verify mode update
Integration tests verify database persistence of mode changes
Tests verify mode validation prevents invalid values
